templates.name: Password Reset
templates.template:
Hi {customer_name},

I can help you regain access to your account.

To reset your password:
1. Go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'
2. Enter your registered email address
3. Click the reset link within 1 hour (check spam folder)
4. Create a new strong password

If your account is locked due to failed attempts, it will automatically unlock after 30 minutes.

Best regards,
Support Team
